query: severely underexposed dark photo crushed shadows black murky
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — severe underexposure, crushed shadows, dark murky atmosphere, mood-driven black tones

response.objective_caption: A person faces the camera in an indoor room, wearing a dark zip-up jacket with a light-colored logo on the left chest. Patterned curtains hang in the background to the left, a dark rectangular fixture is mounted on the wall to the right, and several small items rest on a surface in the lower left.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A person faces the camera in an indoor room, wearing a dark zip-up jacket with a light-colored logo on the left chest, while heavy analog film grain and noise cover the entire frame. Patterned curtains hang in the background to the left, a dark rectangular fixture is mounted on the wall to the right, and several small items rest on a surface in the lower left, all rendered with dense photographic texture and gritty, archival surface quality.
